## Build

```bash
docker build -t qt-course-env .
docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/app -w /app qt-course-env \
    bash -c "qmake ActivityManager.pro && make -j4"
```

## Run Tests

```bash
docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/app -w /app/tests \
    -e QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen qt-course-env \
    bash -c "qmake tests.pro && make -j4 && ./tests -v2"
```
